name: Trippi Troppi
lore:
Lore of Trippi Troppi
                                    


fat bears and fish are treated as 'Tropha Tripa'
Description original text
Trippi troppi, troppa trippa, tre topi trotterellano tra tromboni tritati. Triplicando trottoline tropicali. E chi troppo vuole, nulla trippa!
There are too many twins, and there are too many ruminants. It jumps between the trombons, where three rats are cut. Tropical old women. If you are too greedy, there is no rumin!
